content:
ORGANIC TIBETAN SEA BUCKTHORN
THE COMPLETE VEGAN OMEGA 3-6-7-9 BALANCE

What is Sea Buckthorn?

Sea buckthorn or Seaberry, known as "holy fruit" in Tibet, is found in centuries-old medicinal texts in Tibet and China. It was used there to treat coughing, digestive problems, skin issues, wounds and burns, and even depression in some cases. Recently, science has come to discover its dense nutritional content of omega 3 6 7 9, vitamins, and antioxidants.

Rich in Nutrients:

Sea buckthorn oil is rich in various vitamins, minerals and beneficial plant compounds. Its berries boast potassium, calcium, magnesium, iron and phosphorus. They also contain good amounts of folate, biotin and vitamins B1, B2, B6, C and E. More than half of the fat found in sea buckthorn oil is mono- and polyunsaturated fat, which are two types of healthy fats.

190+ Bioactives:
- Omega 3, 6, 7, 9
- 17 Vitamins
- 14 Minerals
- 18 Amino Acids

Powerful Antioxidant:

Sea Buckthorn, one of the most potent antioxidant plants known, is rich in Proanthocyanidins, Flavonoids, and Polyphenols. Its antioxidant ability is 70X stronger than vitamin C.

Complete Vegan Omega:

Interestingly, sea buckthorn oil is one of the only plant foods known to provide all four omega fatty acids — omega-3, omega-6, omega-7 and omega-9

Wild-harvested Sea Buckthorn contains the full spectrum of Omega 3 6 7 9, with the highest known concentration of Omega 7 known in the animal or plant kingdom.

Omega 7:

Omega 7 is a novel unsaturated fatty acid that was first discovered by scientists at Harvard Medical School in 2008. Researchers have shown that Omega 7 is effective in preventing cardiovascular disease, cholesterol accumulation and lipid deposits in blood vessels, in addition to stimulating mucous membrane regeneration in the ocular, oral, respiratory, intestinal, vaginal and skin tissues.

In nature, Omega 7 can be found in Avocado, Peruvian Anchovy Fish, and Macadamia Nut. However, Tibetan Sea Buckthorn has the highest Omega 7 content.

Puredia's Unique Omega 7 - OMEGIA®:

Comprising of both the organic sea buckthorn fruit and seed oil, OMEGIA® is a unique standardized formula containing a balanced ratio of all the unsaturated fatty acids: Omega-3-6-7-9. Moreover, it also consists of many antioxidants, such as beta-carotene and vitamin E, and plant sterols, which are essential for human health.

Mechanism of Action:
- Omega-3: Reduces TNF-alpha, IL-1 beta, IL-6, MIP-3 alpha and IL-1 selectin (pro-inflammatory)
- Omega-6: 15-LOX (15-lipoxygenase) converts to 15-HEPE (anti-inflammatory), 15-HETrE and 15-HETE (anti-inflammatory)
- Omega-7: Increase IL-10 (Anti-inflammatory), Reduce TNF-alpha & IL-1 beta (pro-inflammatory)
- Omega-9: Supports skin & mucous membrane health

Benefits of OMEGIA™:
- Supports healthy skin hydration/elasticity
- Helps to reduce the appearance of wrinkles
- Supports healthy vaginal tissue/moisture
- Reduce symptoms of menopause
- Helps alleviates dry eyes
- Helps alleviates dry mouth
- Promotes heart health
- Boost immune system

Tibetan Sea Buckthorn Nutritional Facts (per 100g):
- Calories: 547 kcal
- Total fat: 31g (Saturated 9.8g, Monounsaturated 18.05g, Polyunsaturated 1.9g)
- Total Carbohydrate: 64.96g
- Dietary Fiber: 1.19g
- Sugars: 4.3g
- Protein: 0.91g
- Sodium: 357mg
- Calcium: 38.5mg
- Iron: 7.98mg
- Vitamin C: 1456mg
- Vitamin A: 2238.2 IU
- Beta-carotene: 1.34mg
- Riboflavin (Vit B2): 6.18mg
- Niacin (Vit B3): 0.14mg
- Choline (Vit B4): 13.52mg
- Adenine (Vit B4): 2.71mg
- Pantothenic Acid (Vit B5): 1.17mg
- Pyridoxine (Vit B6): 0.02mg
- Biotin (Vit B7): 6.94mcg
- Folate (Vit B9): 17.86mcg
- Vitamin E: 410mg
- Total Amino Acid: 390.6mg
- Omega 3: 1458mg
- Omega 6: 3202mg
- Omega 7: 12078mg
- Omega 9: 4958mg

Puredia's Supercritical CO2 Extraction:

While the Sea Buckthorn is a powerful little fruit, it is also delicate. Extracting its essence can be tricky because even a small change in temperature during the process can have a significant impact on quality and nutrients. For that reason, we utilize Supercritical CO2 extraction to ensure that every drop of oil, puree, and powder is as pure and potent as possible.

Supercritical CO2 extraction is a clean, non-toxic process that we use to draw out the essence of the Sea Buckthorn. When the Sea Buckthorn berries or seeds are added to the CO2 in liquid form, it pulls the oils out, retaining nearly all the vitamins, essential fatty acids, proteins, and other beneficial components. This meticulous process is well worth the work—unlike other extraction methods, it does not cause any heat or chemical damage to the berry because there is no risk of oxidation.

Microencapsulation:

A majority of the bioactive nutrients in sea buckthorn comes in oil forms, including Omega-3-6-7-9, beta-carotene, and vitamin E. And their applications are limited to mainly softgel or ready-to-use oil.

With our advanced microencapsulation technology, Puredia incorporates the functional lipids from sea buckthorn with selected carbohydrates. This leads to the creation of a series of water-dispersible nutritional lipids powder, namely Omega Powder.

This technology provides formulators with more flexibility in formulation design and allows more convenient and innovative applications. The additional microencapsulation shell also protects the easily-oxidized nutritional lipids from oxidation and allows controlled release of the nutrients, ensuring the best bioavailability.

SEM (Scanning Electron Microscopy) images of Puredia SeaBerry® Omega Powder show the complete encapsulation of tiny lipid droplets into powder form at 50μm and 200μm.
